summary: The DNS tree divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in an invalid child-hash error return; no DNS tree parsing behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 130: M	crates/net/dns/src/tree.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Err(ParseDnsEntryError::InvalidChildHash(hash.to_string()))` to a semicolon-terminated form.
No base32 decoded-length bound, whitespace check, error type, or accepted child hash behavior changed.
